creator: jhelfman@e-e.com
text:
Looks good, however I will test tomorrow. If you have time would you mind
adding in the patch I submitted for 'ports/151078' to this diff. If not, I
can test regardless.

The license loop is with a full pkg_add of all dependencies inside a clean
system. That is the only way I found it.

So a clean install/or jail. Then a pkg_add on tomcat should pull in all the
dependencies, and then I hit the loop.


Thanks!
-jgh

On Thu, Sep 30, 2010 at 12:18:41AM +0200, olli hauer thus spake:
>On 2010-09-28 01:03, Jason wrote:
>> I don't feel it is entirely necessary, however I found that if you try to do
>> a pkg_add for diablo-jdk and tomcat at the same time it would go into
>> continuous acceptance loop. ports/150539
>>
>> I am uncertain if this is due to a bug only in diablo-jdk port, or a
>> combination of doing a pkg_add on them together.
>>
>> I implemented this in the meanwhile.
>>
>> I have not tested this patch against the latest tomcat, however there are a
>> number of items that are broken which won't change, or be fixed, based on a
>> release. These are issues exclusive to the port.
>>
>> The startup-script was fixed, and the installation via pkg is now fully
>> supported (even if you choose to remove the license addition).
>>
>> -jgh
>>
>
>Hi Jason,
>
>I've reworked your patches and have parts of the pkg-install script
>rewritten. Until now I haven't run into the described problem with
>a license loop (PR 150539)
>
>Can you test the following patch
>http://people.freebsd.org/~ohauer/diffs/PR_150576_tomcat55.diff
>
>I documented the changes in the Makefile/scripts for further use.
>
>Additional I updated tomcat to version 5.5.31.
>
>--
>olli
>

-- 
Jason Helfman
System Administrator
experts-exchange.com
http://www.experts-exchange.com/M_4830110.html
